content:
Tri-County Amateur Radio Club THE TRI-COUNTY AMATEUR RADIO CLUB OPERATES 1 Weekly NET
THE KØMOB Moberly 2 METER NET AT 8 PM EVERY THURSDAY- JOIN US! any current F.C.C. license holders @ 147.090 + 0.6 offset PL Tone Squelch 127.3 Our weekly net control is Alan- KEØPEI or one of our Alternate Backup Operators.
Our Club has 2 Repeaters in use, 2-Meter 147.090 + 0.6 offset PL Tone Squelch 127.3 and 70-cm 443.975 5.0 offset NO PL Tone
The next TRI-COUNTY AMATEUR RADIO CLUB meeting is on June 16th 2026 @ 6:30PM all are welcome. Please join us…. The counties we serve in our memebership are Randolph, Charition, Howard in Missouri Also With our (ARES) Amateur Radio Emergency Services Group for Randolph County Mo. @ this meeting address 1301 E Logan St, Moberly, MO 65270
contact This page is constantly being updated with current information moving forward. The Tri county ARC now has a (TRI COUNTY ARC) Slack channel and its available to all paid club memeberships for access. For Any questions on how to join our Moberly Ham radio club or questions about the Randolph County Missouri ARES Group for a application to join us and get set up on our (ARES) and/or (TRI COUNTY ARC) Slack accounts… please contact Chris-KFØGUS via Email kf0gus@hotmail.com our Local Emergency Services Coordinator [[[OR]]] Dan-WØPN via email dan.w0pn@gmail.com our Local assistant Emergency Services Coordinator. We are also starting the process to offer once again F.C.C. Ham Radio Licesnse exam testing offered to memebers and non-members to the club. Please stand by for a update on more information here in 2026 as it comes available. Our weather spotter training class will be available again next spring (March) of 2027, date and location TBD please stay tuned to this page for more updates as they become available next year. Licence The Macon County Mo ARC VE Team will be offering Ham Radio F.C.C. License exams for Technician, General, and Extra class levels testing at all future meetings each month on Thursday May 28th 2026 @ 7pm PLEASE RSVP @ KF0GUS@hotmail.com in Advance to ensure we have enough VE’s availble for testing. Testing ONLY location is
806 E. Briggs Dr.
Macon, Missouri 65332
Please bring Vaild Government issued photo ID
FRN Number from the F.C.C. cores website you registered for.
FCC CORES FRN WEB LINK
$15 ARRL testing fee cash or check ONLY. IF you are upgrading please bring a official copy of your current F.C.C Ham Radio License A vaild working email address is required to pay your $35 new License fee or for renewal….NO EXCEPTIONS DIRECTLY and electronically to the F.C.C. website FCC PAYMENT WEB LINK more information here on testing at MACON COUNTY ARC WEBSITE
board President Dan-W0PN Vice Pres Doug Buckman Treasurer Chris-KFØGUS Secretary Chris-KFØGUS Repeater Trustee Chris-KFØGUS Emergency Services Coordinator-ARES-Chris-KFØGUS Assistant Emergency Services Coordinator-ARES-Dan-WØPN

  • Our Club has 2 Repeaters in use, 2-Meter 147.090 + 0.6 offset PL Tone Squelch 127.3 and 70-cm 443.975 5.0 offset NO PL Tone

content: Omar Bradley We arhonored to be the Randolph county birthplace (in Clark MO) of the late Omar Bradley 1893-1981 the last USA 5 star general.
